title: Editorial project management in book publishing
excerpt: I work for a publishing company and want to use Monday.com to manage Editorial tasks across imprints. Best template to use for starters? Better to organize by book title, or by type of task? Examples of how it’s worked f…

posts.author: SusieBenton (Susie Benton)
posts.cookedHtml: I work for a publishing company and want to use Monday.com to manage Editorial tasks across imprints. Best template to use for starters? Better to organize by book title, or by type of task? Examples of how it’s worked for you?

posts.author: cbfy (YC)
posts.cookedHtml: Have you had any success with this? Just signed up and am about to attempt to do the same thing.
